title: 3D Printing of Personal Protective Equipment and Repurposing of Air Filters
author: Giana Schena
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bd77i9rn

steps.title: Open the​ facemask_filter_guard
steps.instruction: Open the​ facemask_filter_guard.stl f​ile (currently on scale with the face unit, would also need to be scaled up). a. Support is not necessary b. Guard is in shape of a trapezoid: the face of the guard is 2.5 inches tall with 2.75 inch base length and 1.6 inch top length

substeps.instruction: Open the​ facemask_filter_guard.stl f​ile (currently on scale with the face unit, would also need to be scaled up). a. Support is not necessary b. Guard is in shape of a trapezoid: the face of the guard is

steps.title: Open ​ facemask_clip
steps.instruction: Open ​ facemask_clip.stl​ file and print two copies. Set XYZ percentages to 54%.

steps.title: Ensure the following settings are on...
steps.instruction: Ensure the following settings are on in your printer (Exact wordage for Ultimaker Cura but similar settings available on all slicers): a. Infill density = 30% b. Generate Support = Checked i. Support Placement = Touching Buildplate ii. Support Overhang Angle = 45 degrees

steps.title: Soak the unit and guard in Clorox bleach for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Soak the unit and guard in Clorox bleach for 00:05:00 . Rinse well and air dry.

steps.title: Choose filter material
steps.instruction: Choose filter material: a. For general face mask replacement: ​ option 1 b. For higher levels of protection:​ o​ption 1​ or ​ option 2 c. Peel filter off of metal webbing, discard metal webbing and keep filter material:

steps.title: Cut filter to fit within the guard:
steps.instruction: Cut filter to fit within the guard:

steps.title: Place filter between the guard and...
steps.instruction: Place filter between the guard and the face unit and snap together. The facemask_filter_guard.stl f​its very tightly on the ​ facemask_face_unit.stl b​ut can still be removed for reuse by pressing against the guard from inside the face unit.

steps.title: Attach elastic band to holes on...
steps.instruction: Attach elastic band to holes on either side of the face unit:

steps.title: If desired, padding can be taped...
steps.instruction: If desired, padding can be taped or glued around the outside edges of the facemask.

steps.title: Open the​ facemask_face_unit
steps.instruction: Open the​ facemask_face_unit.stl f​ile (size= currently ~female size, would need to be scaled up). a. Ensure that support is on

steps.title: Print the facemask_single_unit
steps.instruction: Print the facemask_single_unit.stl​ file. File should be printed with support enabled.

steps.title: Print eye goggles using the ​ eyemask_thick
steps.instruction: Print eye goggles using the ​ eyemask_thick.stl ,​ eyemask_thin.stl​ and eyemask_hook.stl​ files.

steps.title: Create a face shield using the ​ faceshield_one_unit
steps.instruction: Create a face shield using the ​ faceshield_one_unit.stl ​file, originally found on Thingiverse and made by ​ HanochH ​. This face shield is ideal because no screws or clamps are required. The model's design uses tension to keep any acrylic sheets firmly in place.

steps.title: Cut and glue plexiglass or A4...
steps.instruction: Cut and glue plexiglass or A4 acrylic sheets in between the eyemask_thick.stl​ (outer piece) and ​ eyemask_thin.stl​ (inner piece) prints.

steps.title: Foam-adhesive weather stripping can be attached...
steps.instruction: Foam-adhesive weather stripping can be attached to the inside of the eyemask_thin.stl​ print for a more comfortable and secure fit on the face.

steps.title: Clip the ​ eyemask_hook
steps.instruction: Clip the ​ eyemask_hook.stl​ print to the ​ eyemask_thick.stl​ print and attach maximum width of 1⁄2” elastic banding for strapping the mask to the face.

steps.title: Two clips can be printed using the ​facemask_clip
steps.instruction: Two clips can be printed using the ​facemask_clip.stl​ file with XYZ percentages set to 54%.

steps.title: Air filtration material should be cut...
steps.instruction: Air filtration material should be cut to fit inside the single unit.

steps.title: Adhesive foam weather stripping and elastic...
steps.instruction: Adhesive foam weather stripping and elastic banding can then be added to create a snug fit on the face.

steps.title: Print two clips using the ​ facemask_clip
steps.instruction: Print two clips using the ​ facemask_clip.stl​ file with XYZ percentages set to 54%.

steps.title: Cut air filtration material to fit inside the single unit
steps.instruction: Cut air filtration material to fit inside the single unit.

steps.title: Adhesive foam weather stripping and elastic...
steps.instruction: Adhesive foam weather stripping and elastic banding can then be added to create a snug fit on the face.

steps.title: Cut a sheet of acrylic to...
steps.instruction: Cut a sheet of acrylic to run along the diameter of the opening. This design is made to fit A4 sheets and the original makers tested to confirm this design works with 0.10mm and 0.24mm thickness sheets. A video of the mask in use can be seen on the makers ​ thingiverse ​.
